title: Make line item quantities adjustable
excerpt: Enable your customers to adjust the quantity of items during checkout. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/adjustable-quantity.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/adjustable-quantity.md?payment-ui=embedded-page) - [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/adjustable-quantity.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
